name: Today's Good Luck
desc:
"My dear junior soror, are you absolutely certain?"
"Hmph, without a doubt!"
"The stakes are higher than just a bottle of hand cream this time."
"Such an easy game... what could possibly go wrong?"
The pink-haired girl turned away, refusing to be bothered further.
"Judging by the way the tea leaves float, you should play that card."
The girl drew a lot and turned it over.
"Ah, my luck is turning around."
"One more time, this can't be possible..."
...
The girl forgot how many divination games she played with her senior soror, only remembering how her senior was always willing to play again and again with her.
Later, the girl wanted to escape from the prophesied fate, and despite opposition, she went to the Luofu Divination Commission.
Upon arriving at the Luofu, she suddenly discovered an exquisite divination bookmark between the pages of a divination folio. The familiar handwriting made the outland girl tear up:
"Who says destiny doesn't have a second chance? Here's my lucky charm for you~"
